message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant ElementModel as ElementModel
participant CardModel as CardModel
participant StringCard as StringCard
participant Publish as Publish
participant ElementView as ElementView
participant DeckView as DeckView
participant IOTech as IOTech
participant DeckTechView as DeckTechView

actor ElementModel

actor CardModel

actor StringCard

actor Publish

actor ElementView

actor DeckView

actor IOTech

actor DeckTechView

ElementModel->>CardModel: encode
CardModel->>StringCard: create
StringCard-->>CardModel: return

CardModel-->>ElementModel: return StringCardCollection

ElementModel->>Publish: send StringCardCollection
Publish->>ElementView: send StringCardCollection
ElementView->>ElementView: Store StringCardCollection

ElementModel->>DeckView: Show
DeckView->>DeckTechView: GetDeckView
DeckTechView->>DeckTechView: create
DeckTechView-->>DeckView: return
DeckTechView-->>DeckView: Show(StringCardCollection)

@enduml
